title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Best running shoe  yet!
reviews.text: I’ve tried a lot of shoes - Newtons, Brooks (Levitate), Hoka ( Clifton), Ons, Altras, Topos (Ultrafly), Mizunos (Hitogami), Adidas, etc. and these are the best. Most like the Hokas in terms of weight and comfort but with better arch.  While I still have my Brooks, Hokas, and Adidas in my shoe rotation these are the ones I use for my long runs. - context: 25 to 30 mile a week runner, 3 marathons, ~ 10 halfs, numerous 12 k and under distances.

title: ASICS Men's GEL Excite 3 Running Shoe
description:
The energetic design of the GEL-Excite™ 3 features a Rearfoot GEL® Cushioning System and breathable mesh upper for everyday comfort. This exciting update is a great choice for low mileage runners seeking a great fit and cushioned ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic

description: Smooth and steady wins the run: our most-loved support shoe is better than ever. With an updated midsole made with 100% DNA LOFT, and featuring our trusted GuideRails support, the Adrenaline GTS 22 delivers our smoothest ride yet.
features: Imported

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride, with great cushion and trusted GuideRails support that won’t distract from the fun of the run. This Brooks Adrenaline GTS 22 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides just the right amount of stability and support, great for overpronation while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Adrenaline GTS 21
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: The updated midsole is now 100% DNA LOFT cushioning paired with the Segmented Crash Pad for an even softer, smoother ride and easier flow from landing to toe-off.
MODERNIZED FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology offers the structure and proven fit the Adrenaline is known for without excess bulk.

GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We've shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails keep you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

reviews.title: Great Fit
reviews.text: Brooks are my favorite!  I'm on my feet a lot either working out or walking they always give me the support I need and they are comfortable all day!  I am 5' 10", 175lbs & 57 years young! I ordered a 10.5 and they fit perfectly.  I stopped buying size 10 altogether in all brands I think my feet got bigger as I got older and even though I don't like it the 10.5 gives my toes a little more room and being on the go I'm more about comfort and support.  They are always stylish and these are light grey, pink and black! Highly recommend!

Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

features: ⛈️【High Quality & Weatherproof】Our runner shoe lights are made of aluminum alloy and ABS plastic, IPX5 Waterproof, these lights for shoes are built to withstand the toughest rainstorm. Rather it be snow or heavy rain, our gear got your cover.

🔆【Lightweight & Bright】They are pretty lightweight (each light weights only 25g). It stays stable while you walk or run without you even notice. These shoe lights for night safety are bright which can increase your visibility to avoid tripping on things and seeing the path. Let you see and be seen safely in the dark from dusk till dawn.

💡【Upgraded Hidden Switch】Press on the head of the shoe light to turn on/off and switch 3 different modes base on your need (Always Bright, Flashing, or Flashing slowly). It can retain power for 72 hours on its highest setting. An essential safety equipment for any low-light activity.

✨【Easy to Install】Night runner shoe lights the bottom design allows you to fix the shoe light on your shoelace or straps firmly. Note: Please remove the insulating paper between the two batteries at first.

🏃🏽【Application to All Outdoor Activities】Runners shoe lights for night safety, these lights for shoes are hands-free lighting solution for runners, hikers, or any outdoor enthusiast. You can safely trek through mountains, trails, or your own neighborhood knowing you’ve got reliable, safe lighting at all times. Whether running, cycling, walking, hiking, camping, fishing, or walking your dog.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text: I was excited to receive these. I also have a pair that stick in the hole on the shoes. I prefer these, however, because you can adjust where the beam is directed by moving the heel strap around. I use my crocs for taking care of the chickens. So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.

reviews.title: They are ok
reviews.text:

They seem a bit heavy but I will use them. Safety is more important.

reviews.title: These run a size too small (Mens)
reviews.text: Received my new running shoes about 15 minutes ago from Amazon.  I was excited to use these shoes on a run and tried them on.  I have a narrow foot and wear an 11 in New Balance (based on 3 pairs of shoes), and every other brand except Salomon and Saucony that run small.  Well, these run small, really small.  My toe was touching the end of the shoe, and these were very tight and hard to get on (I have a narrow foot!).  These are lightweight, look good, and appear to be somewhat well made.  The soles look like they are cheaper foam, and don't really have a running shoe tread.  Not sure how long they would last, but at the under forty dollar price when marked down, not a bad deal.  I would expect to get at least 200 miles on pavement running out of these.

title: New Balance Men's Fresh Foam X Vongo V5 Running Shoe
description: The New Balance Fresh Foam X Vongo v5 running shoe for men is a luxurious combination of softness and stability. A Fresh Foam midsole provides plush underfoot cushioning for the long miles, while stability features in the midsole and upper offer comfortable support throughout your run.
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride
Hypoknit upper with embroidery for zonal support
Medial post helps control pronation
Lace-up closure for a secure fit
8 mm drop; due to variances created during the development and manufacturing processes, all references to 8 mm drop are approximate

reviews.title: Nicely padded and breathable with multi-rubber soles for durability
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:fc87d73d73cdf58ce51bd49ab3a7a78e]] Very comfortable sneaker that is true to size and designed for running. Nonetheless, they provide maximum support and comfort for foot, knees, shins, and joints for any activity level. Pronation control helps better footing and wear of the sneaker. I am impressed by these and they have a lot of bounce that translates to more comfortable miles.

Trust you found this review honest and helpful:-)

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: I’m new into running but wanted a distance shoe (good cushion and support) and I am blown away at how good these feel. I usually wear a 10-10.5 but I wear an 11 in these (was fitting at a running shop). Went 2 miles this afternoon and was very happy with the responsiveness and comfort.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported
Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.

reviews.title: Great for disc golf
reviews.text: Image is my second attempt at patching a massive toe hole. Probably should just buy a new pair... These lasted through 4 months of pretty intense disc golf. All told, probably 350 miles of running on trails, through creeks and mud, etc. Not to mention repeated torsion on the fabric in a way it wasn't designed for. Through it all, these have dried quickly and remained comfortable. Not bad for $50, would buy again.

reviews.title: 13W - Wide toe box
reviews.text: This is my second purchase of these shoes, which fit well because they are wide in the toes as well as the mid section.  often wide shoes are too narrow in the toe box, and these fit great.  My existing pair has aged well, and after much wear, it has developed a tear in the inside lining near the heel.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.
features: 100% Synthetic/Fabric
Rubber sole
Heel measures approximately 1.75"
Anti-debris mesh protects the foot from dirt, twigs, and pebbles
Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: Perfect trail shoe!
reviews.text: Bought these for my wife. Her words are: "I love them"! She says she has wide feet and they still fit perfectly, she wore them all day for a 14 mile mud run/obstacle course and had a great experience with these shoes. Great traction in the mud!

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: Love these shoes! So comfortable and well made!

reviews.title: Wife loves them.
reviews.text: I purchased these shoes for my wife as a gift for our trail hiking and she absolutely loves them! Wears them all day now.

reviews.title: Fit great and look good too
reviews.text: I own more than one pair of these, as the fit and support work well for me. They cradle the foot, especially under the arch, and fit more narrowly than many other sneakers (which makes them just right for me). I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

reviews.title: Awesome shoe, my third pair in ten years.
reviews.text: The best.  Super secure on trail, uneven surfaces, great looking and very comfortable.  I won't wear anything else!

reviews.title: Less structured support, lots of rubber to the road
reviews.text: Really like these; plenty of expected toe room (hallelujah!👏)  The footbed is more flat and neutral than my other Adidas, but they’re good. Less support, but still comfy. I love Adidas balance between support and bounce; some shoes i have sunk into so hard, they’re too much work to wear for someone with extra weight! Then there are the hard-as-cardboard styles that offer so much “support” they’re painful and unbearable. Not these! They conform yet manage to be stable; balance, zen-like ✌🏼 I am now officially an Adidas lady for the haul, they’re impressive. Oh, these are a bit wide on me, likely perfect on an “average” width foot. Oh, that glorious toe room! 💜 and one more thing; the platform is wider than any other shoes I have, and actually was hard to get used to. But I have.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

title: VOCOOL 100 PCS 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Pyramid Replacement Track Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes, Black/Silver
features: 【What You Get】: Package includes 100 pieces black spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.

【Quality Material】: These spikes are made of quality hard steel, durable and rust-resist and anti-corrode, ensure you to use for a long time.Easy to match with most of the track shoes, improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed.

【Easy to Use & Replace Spikes】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【Size】: 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding,especially suit for track sprints, long jump,running, outdoor sports activities.

【Improve Running】: If you like running, climbing, or you are a sports enthusiast, this track spikes will help you a lot. This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.
